data.title: $400 million linked to Helix Darknet Mixer seized by US authorities for processing illicit Bitcoin funds on dark web.
data.description: Authorities have disclosed that a significant sum of money, amounting to hundreds of millions of dollars in Bitcoin, was handled by the mixer. Prosecutors have alleged that these funds were related to illegal transactions conducted on the dark web.
INDONESIA STOCK EXCHANGE CEO RESIGNS AFTER MARKET ROUT

data.title: Cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin & Ethereum, plunged amid tech sell-off. Bitcoin dropped to $83,742.77 (-5.68%) with over $1B liquidated in market. Bitcoin trading volume surged by 64%, indicating high selling pressure. Ethereum dropped to $2,801.73 (-6.37%). XRP dropped to $1.79 (-5.36%), Dogecoin to $0.1167 (-5.89%). Market saw over $1.74B liquidated with $1.64B in longs wiped out. $1.74B liquidated in market with 64% increase in trading volume. Shares of related companies, including MSTR & BMNR, closed down nearly 10%. Bitcoin open interest fell by 2.24% in the last 24 hours.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced a sharp decline on Thursday as a tech-driven sell-off led to a downturn in risk-on markets. Bitcoin dropped by 5.68% to $83,742.77, while Ethereum fell by 6.37% to $2,801.73. XRP and Dogecoin also recorded declines, with XRP dropping by 5.36% to $1.79 and Dogecoin falling by 5.89% to $0.1167. Solana experienced a 5.90% drop to $117.27. Bitcoin's trading volume surged by 64% over the last 24 hours, indicating high selling pressure. Ethereum reached its lowest point since early July at $2,751. Cryptocurrency-related companies like Strategy Inc. and Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. closed down by 9.63% and 9.89%, respectively. Over $1.74 billion was liquidated from the market in the past 24 hours, with $1.64 billion coming from levered longs. Bitcoin's open interest also decreased by 2.24% in the last 24 hours.

data.title: Remedi enhances waste tracking for hospitals, aiding in landfill diversion and compliance. SAN ANTONIO, Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 29, 2026, remedi, a regulated medical waste processor, revealed the bolstering of its waste tracking and reporting capabilities. This enhancement in visibility allows healthcare systems to better measure landfill diversion, compliance, and operational performance. This will significantly aid in ensuring accurate and efficient management of medical waste.

data.title: Bybit plans to become "The New Financial Platform" by 2026, offering a global financial ecosystem beyond crypto exchange.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the world's second-largest crypto exchange in terms of trading volume, revealed its plan to rebrand as "The New Financial Platform" for the year 2026. This transformation aims to establish a worldwide financial ecosystem to enhance availability to contemporary banking, investment, and payment services.
Platinum falls more than 3%, trading at $2,521.65/oz.

data.title: Vision Group in Shenzhen released a white paper on AIDC UPS Lithium Battery Safety in line with growing power demands.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 29, 2026, the AI Computing Center (AIDC) is emerging as a crucial component in the advancement of artificial intelligence technology. These centers are pivotal in driving the next generation of computing with their rapid development. However, alongside this progress comes a significant rise in power consumption needs and reliability standards.

data.title: Kyivstar prices secondary offering at $10.50/share for 12.5M shares held by VEON, with option for 1.9M more at same price.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON) mentioned that Kyivstar Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: KYIV; KYIVW), the leading digital operator in Ukraine, has disclosed the pricing for its public offering. The offering includes 12,100,000 common shares held by VEON Amsterdam B.V. and 400,000 common shares held by other selling shareholders. The public offering price is set at USD 10.50 per share. Additionally, the Selling Shareholders have provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 1,875,000 common shares at the same public offering price, with deductions for underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: Craft saké brewery SakéOne partners with USA Curling Men's Team Casper, bringing artisan saké twist to American watch parties in Feb 2026.
data.description: Forest Grove, Oregon, and Eden Prairie, Minnesota, January 29, 2026 - In a unique collaboration for American watch parties this February, SakéOne, known as America's first craft saké brewery, is teaming up with the USA Curling Men's Team Casper. The partnership aims to offer an artisanal spin to the event.
